rationale: The cited paper appears as a single supporting reference in the robustness section, where the authors note that demographics can influence customer satisfaction in other contexts. It is used as an example to justify a plausibility claim for constructing an exogenous, demographic-driven satisfaction component, not as a core theoretical or methodological basis for the main model. The citing paper does not build directly on the cited paper's repurchase framework, measures, or empirical design.
